title: Sidebar advises CarbonStrong Technologies on seed fundraise
description: CarbonStrong Technologies Private Limited has concluded a seed investment round led by Foundation for Innovation and Social Entrepreneurship and Rainmatter Investments.Sidebar advised CarbonStrong Technologies on this fundraise.The transaction team was led by Shivendra Singh (Partner), with support from Associates Swati Sharma, Tanay Sharma and Teesha.Founding Partner Purusharth Singh provided strategic guidance.Founded in 2022, CarbonStrong is a start-up focusing on innovative technology to pro
